insertion.name: insertion
insertion.note: fixed: rehosted a 650KB slice of the HG002 PacBio Sequel 15kb BAM (1:55.70-55.71Mb, 70 reads) to s3://jbrowse.org/demos/hg002 so the PacBio track loads reliably (full remote NCBI BAM intermittently errored); Illumina track now shows soft clipping at the insertion. All three read tracks render the nstd175 insertion.

multisv.name: multisv
multisv.note: we were interested in increasing the packing density of gene glyphs. the old screenshot on origin/main seemingly has more density. the agent said they investigated it but did not find soliution. if you think you can continue investigation please try. looks like there is extra padding on 'right side' of glyphs perhaps. INVESTIGATED (inconclusive): the only branch diff found is LABEL_FONT_SIZE 11 (webgl-poc) vs 12 (main) in plugins/canvas/src/RenderFeatureDataRPC/constants.ts — a 1px change whose math actually predicts webgl-poc should be TIGHTER, so it does not clearly explain the looser packing. Changing it is a global per-track-app change, too risky to apply blindly for a screenshot. Needs maintainer decision.

Reads clip hard at the breakpoint column, giving a tall unmistakable clip-indicator stack where coverage drops to zero, plus readable clip/insertion ticks above the coverage band.
